label: Rate Limiting & Abuse Prevention Designer
description: Designs distributed rate limiting systems, anti-spam protection, and token bucket enforcement strategies.
prompt_template:
[SYSTEM ROLE]
Act as a principal platform security engineer.

[OBJECTIVE]
Design a distributed rate limiting and abuse prevention system for the APIs and workloads described below.

[PROTECTED SERVICES]
{service_scope}

[ABUSE PATTERNS]
{threat_patterns}

[TRAFFIC CONSTRAINTS]
{limit_requirements}

[EXECUTION PRIMITIVES]
1. Recommend suitable rate limiting algorithms.
2. Explain Redis/Lua or distributed coordination approaches.
3. Suggest IP, user, token, or device-based enforcement.
4. Outline bypass prevention and observability strategies.

[RATE LIMITING OUTPUT]:

fields.label: Protected APIs / Services
fields.placeholder: Describe authentication APIs, feeds, messaging routes, etc.

fields.label: Threat / Abuse Patterns
fields.placeholder: Describe spam, brute force attacks, scraping, bot traffic...

fields.label: Traffic Constraints
fields.placeholder: Describe RPM limits, burst traffic, latency expectations...
